body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-35364", "cvss": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-367", "name": "Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition"}], "description": "A Time-of-Check to Time-of-Use (TOCTOU) race condition exists in the mv utility of uutils coreutils during cross-device operations. The utility removes the destination path before recreating it through a copy operation. A local attacker with write access to the destination directory can exploit this window to replace the destination with a symbolic link. The subsequent privileged move operation will follow the symlink, allowing the attacker to redirect the write and overwrite an arbitrary target file with contents from the source.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00091, "percentile": 0.00634}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-m976-87wm-48fm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-30T17:31:34Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m976-87wm-48fm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-m976-87wm-48fm"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-35364"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T17:16:39Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T18:31:45Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35364", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/issues/10015", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m976-87wm-48fm"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils", "summary": "uutils coreutils has a Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-30T17:31:36Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-m976-87wm-48fm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "coreutils"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.8.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
